notes: Extended cases for recursively reversing a linked list.

cases.name: sample_recursive_reverse
expect_contains_all: The resulting linked list after reversed the given linked list is: 5 4 3 2 1

cases.name: single_node_reverse_is_same
expect_contains_all: The resulting linked list after reversed the given linked list is: 42

cases.name: two_nodes_reverse
expect_contains_all: The resulting linked list after reversed the given linked list is: 9 8

cases.name: reverse_with_negative_and_zero
expect_contains_all: The resulting linked list after reversed the given linked list is: 10 4 0 -1
